goal: Build a grasp-pose-sampler SDG station: 1 target object on a tabletop, grasp_pose_sampler generates antipodal grasps for SDG dataset. Realizes #32 GraspingWorkflow SDG infrastructure.
thoughts:
Six SDG-grasping specifics for CP-63:
1) Single target object — a 5cm cube at [0.4, 0, 0.835].
2) Franka at standard mount.
3) setup_grasp_pose_sampler generates 100 antipodal grasps for the target.
4) NO conveyor or pick-place flow — pure SDG dataset generation scenario.
5) Real SDG would replicate the scene N times with randomized target poses + render annotations.
6) Realizes #32 infrastructure. Runtime SDG via Replicator pipeline is Sprint 4+.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Single target object
create_prim(prim_path="/World/TargetCube", prim_type="Cube", position=[0.4, 0, 0.835], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/TargetCube", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/TargetCube"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/TargetCube", material_name="rubber")

# Grasp-pose sampler
setup_grasp_pose_sampler(
    sampler_path="/World/GraspSampler",
    target_path="/World/TargetCube",
    n_samples=100,
    sampling_mode="antipodal",
)
extension_notes: CP-63 demonstrates setup_grasp_pose_sampler for SDG (#32). Sampler config attrs set on /World/GraspSampler. Runtime grasp generation + Replicator dataset writeout is Sprint 4+.
failure_modes: No conveyor / no pick-place — verify_args/form-gate likely fails (build-only canonical).
Grasp sampler attrs are metadata only — actual grasp synthesis requires runtime tooling.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

# Single target object
create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_name="rubber")

# Grasp-pose sampler
setup_grasp_pose_sampler(
    sampler_path="/World/GraspSampler",
    target_path={{workpieces[0].path}},
    n_samples=100,
    sampling_mode="antipodal",
)
